_readme: Editable copy for the site. Nothing here is code — edit freely and redeploy.

factOfRelease.headline: [PLACEHOLDER] Fact of the release goes here
factOfRelease.body: This slot is hand-edited by the site owner ahead of each release — a single striking, sourced fact about Australia's trajectory. Replace this placeholder before publishing. Example shape: 'Australia's productivity growth has averaged X% a year over the past decade, ranking Nth of 9 peer countries.'

about.mission: [PLACEHOLDER] Write the mission statement here — why this Scorecard exists, who it's for, and what it is trying to make legible that isn't already.
about.independence: [PLACEHOLDER] Write the independence statement here — funding, affiliations (or lack thereof), and how methodology decisions are made and disclosed.
about.evolving: This scorecard is built in the open and stays honest about its own gaps — the Data status page is the receipt: which measures are fully established, which are live but young or incomplete, and which are still waiting on their first real data.
